标题: New arrival! The Russian clown (Konstantin Chayin) girls' trendy watch has become very popular, completely overturning traditional watch dial designs. The dial features a constantly changing clown face with rotating eyes, a crazy expression, and a red tongue sticking out. The facial expressions are very diverse, with the eyes indicating minutes and hours respectively, offering over ten thousand different expressions each day. This unique and humorous design element is unforgettable to those who have seen it, with many being captivated by its nose, eyes, mouth, face, and ears! Those who have seen this watch are all amazed, with many becoming obsessed with it. The best version available on the market. The Russian clown's ["Breakthrough" Annual Masterpiece in the Watch Industry] by Konstantin Chayin, Chairman of the AHCI Independent Watchmakers Association, features a quartz movement synchronized with the original, with the latest upgrade including a swinging tongue. It offers stable timekeeping and a solid texture. The meticulous CNC polishing of the details ensures that the watch is as close to the original as possible, meeting all your beautiful feelings towards the Russian clown's "smiling face." Please look for the exclusive quality that allows independent adjustment of the time.
